arabic_text:
سورۃ الواقعۃ
سابقون
أصحاب الیمین
أصحاب الشمال
english_text:
1. سابقون / ELITE group in Heaven
2. أصحاب الیمین / People of RIGHT hand in Heaven
3. أصحاب الشمال / People of LEFT hand in Heaven
4. Things only Allah can do
5. Greatness and glory of Quran
alt_text: Five-box outline of Sura al-Waqi'ah (Q56): (1) Sabiqun / the Elite, (2) Companions of the Right, (3) Companions of the Left, (4) Things only Allah can do, (5) Greatness and glory of Quran.
